message:
chore(beads): add CASS provider parity epic with 7 granular task beads

Create bd-34m epic and 7 task beads for porting remaining CASS providers
(ClawdBot, Vibe, Factory, OpenClaw, Pi-Agent) plus integration wiring
and cross-provider testing. Full dependency graph established.
